title: Add Server header to API service responses
body:
Aids in reading logs of different services

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

`special_testing_rootless RCLI:false` failure was a "connection closed", suggesting that the VM died somehow before completing all the tests (and not timeout-related). I have restarted it.
